data.title: Japan's Coincheck Crypto Exchange Enters Wall Street With Nasdaq Listing
data.description: Japan-based cryptocurrency exchange Coincheck started trading on the Nasdaq stock exchange Wednesday following a strategic merger with a special purpose acquisition company.

data.title: Microsoft's Mustafa Suleyman Is Recruiting Google DeepMind Talent As Redmond Plans AI Healthcare Superiority: Report
data.description: Microsoft is advancing its AI healthcare efforts by establishing a new division led by Mustafa Suleyman and recruiting top talent from Google DeepMind, aiming to leverage generative AI to improve healthcare access and reduce costs.

data.title: Palantir Positioned To Become 'The Next' Oracle In 2025, Says Dan Ives: 'Messi Of AI' Set For Breakout Year
data.description: Palantir Technologies Inc. is positioned to become "the next Oracle" in 2025, according to Wedbush Securities Managing Director Dan Ives, who named it the most underappreciated tech stock in his annual sector outlook on Wednesday, Dec. 11, 2024.

data.title: Shiba Inu Poised For 180% Upside, Says Analyst — HODLers Keep Selling
data.description: Popular dog-themed cryptocurrency Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) lifted sharply Wednesday amid a broader market rally.

data.title: Larry Summers Warns Of Nixon-Era Risks In Trump's Term: Policies Could Trigger 'Significantly Larger' Inflation
data.description: Former U.S. Treasury Secretary Larry Summers cautioned on Wednesday, Dec. 11, 2024, that President-elect Donald Trump's proposed economic policies could trigger more severe inflation than the surge experienced during President Joe Biden's term, highlighting potential risks for investors and markets.
